_meta.description: Structured inventory of distinct entities surfaced across the 24-brief Mesopotamian-theology corpus + 3 curated v0.6 datasets. Compiled by Phase-2 Discovery Engine subagent at v0.7.0 release. Each entity carries a primary_brief pointer plus cross_references to other briefs in which it is materially discussed. Used as the entity layer underneath discoveredCandidates.json — see SPEC-v0.7.0-discovery-engine.md.

entities.name: Tiamat
key_attributes: split by Marduk to form heaven/earth

entities.name: Qingu
key_attributes: consort of Tiamat after Apsû's death
blood used to create humanity in EE Tablet VI

entities.name: Wē-ila
key_attributes: god slaughtered in Atrahasis for human creation
his eṭemmu (ghost) survives in human consciousness

entities.name: Ereshkigal
key_attributes: in labor in the descent narrative
candidate identity for the Burney Relief

entities.name: Ninurta
key_attributes: recovers Tablet of Destinies from Anzû

entities.name: Erra
key_attributes: war-god protagonist of the Erra Epic

entities.name: Išum
key_attributes: redirects Erra's destruction outward to Suteans

entities.name: Nusku
key_attributes: invoked at Bīt Mēseri close (Tablet II)

entities.name: Adad
key_attributes: Enmeduranki receives divination from Šamaš and Adad

entities.name: Dumuzi
key_attributes: gate-keeper of Anu's heaven in Adapa

entities.name: Damkina
key_attributes: partially merged with Bēlet-ilī in late tradition

entities.name: Anzû
key_attributes: steals Tablet of Destinies from Enlil

entities.name: Mummu
key_attributes: bound by Ea after Apsû's killing

entities.name: El
key_attributes: functionally parallel to Enlil (not etymologically related)

entities.name: Aphrodite
key_attributes: descended from Astarte via Phoenician transmission

entities.name: Kokabel
key_attributes: Watcher who teaches courses of the stars

entities.name: Sariel
key_attributes: revealer of astronomical secrets to Enoch (AB)

entities.name: Gabriel
key_attributes: sets giants warring against each other

entities.name: Uanna
key_attributes: Berossus rendering Oannes from Erythraean Sea

entities.name: Gilgamesh
key_attributes: fifth king of Uruk First Dynasty (SKL)

entities.name: Ut-napishti
key_attributes: settled at the mouth of the rivers
narrates flood to Gilgamesh in Tablet XI

entities.name: Xisuthros
key_attributes: buries tablets at Sippar before Flood

entities.name: Berossus
key_attributes: Babylonian priest of Marduk at Esagila

entities.name: Enheduanna
key_attributes: first named author in human history
high priestess of Nanna at Ur

entities.name: Sîn-lēqi-unninni
key_attributes: founder of named-scholar lineage at Uruk

entities.name: Anunnaki
key_attributes: fifty great Anunnaki / 600 of underworld in late texts

entities.name: Seven Evil Utukku
key_attributes: seven demons in Utukkū Lemnūtu series

entities.name: Five Antediluvian Cities
key_attributes: appear in both SKL and Sumerian Flood Story

entities.name: Adapa myth
key_attributes: refuses bread of life on Ea's coaching

entities.name: Uruk List of Kings and Sages
Ludlul bēl nēmeqi
alt_names: I will praise the lord of wisdom

entities.name: Enmerkar and the Lord of Aratta
key_attributes: heroic epic of First Dynasty of Uruk
Enmerkar = first postdiluvian king's paired sage figure

entities.name: Nam-tilla (eternal life)
key_attributes: withheld from humans by structural necessity

entities.name: Niṣirtu / pirištu (secrecy)
key_attributes: comparative target with Israelite priestly secrecy

entities.name: Eden
key_attributes: tree of life and tree of knowledge

entities.name: Nippur
key_attributes: no political dynasty of its own

entities.name: Etemenanki
alt_names: House Foundation of Heaven and Earth

entities.name: Forbidden arts taught by descended beings
Divine trickery toward humanity
key_attributes: Ea lies to Adapa about food

entities.name: Divine secrecy-oath
key_attributes: Shemyaza's binding oath inverts function (Watchers swear TO transgress)

entities.name: Dream-revelation authorial frame
key_attributes: Kabti-ilāni-Marduk recites Erra in single night

entities.name: Pre-existence of heavenly figure
key_attributes: Son of Man 'before sun and signs were created'

entities.name: Fifty Names of Marduk
key_attributes: each name absorbs older god's prerogative

entities.name: Kingship legitimation by divine decree
key_attributes: king travels to Nippur for Enlil's recognition

entities.name: Kiškanû (sacred tree)
key_attributes: stylized date palm in Assyrian reliefs

entities.name: Catalogue of Texts and Authors
key_attributes: assigns authorship of major works to apkallū + ummânū
